home.title:
Hello!
I'm Dat Truong
home.description: I am currently studying Information Technology at UEH University. My career goal is to become a Software Engineer. I specialize in C#, ASP.NET MVC, SQL Server for backend, and ReactJs for frontend.

supermarket.title: Supermarket Management
supermarket.desc: A WinForms project simulating supermarket sales, with a strong focus on Object-Oriented Programming and SQL Server.
supermarket.modalDesc: A full OOP-based desktop application with inventory tracking, sales reports, and user authentication.

calculator.title: Calculator Simulator
calculator.desc: Implemented the Stack data structure and the Shunting Yard algorithm for infix-to-postfix evaluation.
calculator.modalDesc: An expression calculator that converts infix notation to postfix notation using the Shunting Yard algorithm and evaluates expressions with a stack.

guestbook.title: Guest Book App
guestbook.desc: A web interface that lets users view, write, and store personal messages securely in real time.
guestbook.modalDesc: A real-time message board with secure input handling and database persistence.

myprofile.title: My Profile
myprofile.desc: A creative portfolio showcasing my personal information, strengths, and small projects.
myprofile.modalDesc: This portfolio website with dark mode, smooth animations, music, contact form, and interactive UI details.
